metadata.title: Makarfi Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Makarfi Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Makarfi – Agricultural Heart of Northern Kaduna
slides.subtitle: Makarfi Local Government Area is known for its farming communities and fertile lands in Kaduna State.

slides.title: Makarfi – Community and Development
slides.subtitle: Farmers and traders across Makarfi contribute to food production and local commerce in Kaduna State.

paragraphs: Makarfi Local Government Area is located in the northern region of Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Makarfi town.
The LGA is home to Hausa, Fulani, and other communities. Agriculture is the main economic activity.
Farmers cultivate maize, millet, sorghum, beans, and groundnuts across the area.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Makarfi Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Makarfi Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to improving infrastructure, agriculture, and public services for our communities.
Makarfi is blessed with hardworking farmers and vibrant markets that contribute to Kaduna State's development.
Through good governance and community collaboration, we aim to achieve sustainable development across the LGA.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated across Makarfi communities and serves as a major staple crop.

cards.title: Millet & Sorghum
cards.subtitle: Grain Production
cards.description: Millet and sorghum are important grains grown by farmers across the LGA.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across rural communities within Makarfi.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Makarfi.

hero.title: About Makarfi
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, geography, and economy of Makarfi Local Government Area.

location: Neighboring LGAs: Ikara, Kubau, and Giwa.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Farming, livestock rearing, and trading.
Climate: Tropical savannah climate suitable for agriculture.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Makarfi lies in northern Kaduna State with fertile land suitable for grain production.
geographyEconomy.climate: The area experiences a rainy season between May and October and a dry season from November to April.
mainActivities: Crop Farming: Maize, millet, sorghum, beans, and groundnuts.
Livestock Rearing: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry.
Local Markets: Agricultural trading across communities.

hero.title: Government
hero.subtitle: Leadership and administrative structure of Makarfi Local Government.

structure.intro: Makarfi Local Government operates through an executive leadership supported by a legislative council and administrative departments.
executive: Supervisory Councilors responsible for major sectors.
legislative: The Legislative Council consists of elected councilors representing wards in Makarfi.
A Speaker elected among the councilors presides over legislative sessions.

hero.title: Development Projects
hero.subtitle: Infrastructure and community development initiatives across Makarfi Local Government Area.

projectsPage.introParagraph: Makarfi Local Government continues to invest in roads, schools, healthcare, and agricultural support to improve the quality of life for residents.

hero.title: Agriculture in Makarfi
hero.subtitle: Agriculture remains the backbone of Makarfi's economy.

agriculturePage.overview: Farmers across Makarfi cultivate maize, millet, sorghum, beans, and groundnuts while raising livestock to support food production and local commerce.
